lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Mum says I not to talk to strangers.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: So I's can't says my name is Jill.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: We's be new here, on the bana plantion.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Yeah, we's be new here. Anyway, I gonna go play now.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: No, I not say. You have to guess.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: How d'ya know that? Are you magic?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not really - just call it a gift.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: If you were magic, you would know why the sea is blue... are you magic?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, I'm not magic, and I have no clue why the sea is blue.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Oh, well. That's a bit sad. I was hoping you were magic and could magic me some sweets. But you can't, so I go find someone else who's magic. Bye.

lines.speaker: Jill
lines.text: Thanks so much for saving us from those stinky gublinch. They were awful! I hope Shanty gave you somefing cool for your efforts.
